string 2:
To think she'd catch on to the very existence of ADAMAS! 
Needless to say, we can't reveal our work to the public.

From the time of ADAMAS's inception, our founding members
demanded secrecy. Among them your adoptive father, Dr. Yuki.

If the world caught wind of the paranormal phenomena we
pursue, it'd cause undue chaos. And that is not our intent.

Looks like we can't underestimate this Dr. Monica Simmons...
Be sure not to give away any information inadvertently.
Will this thing really tell us where the egg is?

Not so much where the egg is... More like, where Digimon
are gathered, apparently.
It can probably help us narrow down likely locations.

A spot with lots of readings, huh? That's where we should
search...?

Wow! Look at all of those readings! That's impossible.
Why would so many Digimon be in this world?
Wait, is this place...
It's the underground beneath Shinjuku Park.{next}
It's where we first met.{next}
It's where we encountered that dangerous Digimon.{next}

So you think so, too, huh, {player}? Something must be going on
there...
Well, we've got a lead. Let's make our way over, now!
Why don't we go at night? You do stand out a little too much...

We've been walking around all day, so I think it'd be good
if we got some rest first.

I'm not all that tired. But, fine. You're only humans,
after all.
Let me know once you've had your rest.
Hey, this place looks familiar... We've been here before.
The shutter we just came through was closed last time!
Never would've thought it connected here.

Those readings were up ahead, right? Let's go, but we
should be careful.
This looks like a good place to start filming.

"What's up everyone, we're back with some BREAKING NEWS here
on OcculTokyo TV!"

"I'm sure you've heard all the weird rumors about Shinjuku... 
Well we're here to get to the bottom of..."
Wh-What the...? Psst! Wait, Hiroko!
Inoriii! The camera's rolling, girl!
B-Behind you...! Behind! You!
What's behind me? You're freaking me out.
See? There isn't anything behind m—
Wait... is that...! I-It's a M-M-MONSTER!
Hiroko!
What was that just now?
That shadow... Could it be...?{next}
I've got a bad feeling about this.{next}
So now it's here, huh?{next}

The same one from that last time...? The one that was after 
the egg in the temple...?
I've got a bad feeling about this.

You mean... It came all the way here, to look for the egg
that fell into this world?

And it might still be after that egg. Let's hurry to the 
spot with the reading.
It looks like... Hiroko passed out...

We should leave her here. We can't have her fainting every
two seconds.
Yeah... I guess you're right. Sorry, Hiroko.

It looks like we can get to the underground from beyond
that fence. Come on. Let's go.
{next}...No good. I can't seem to open it.
Hmph. Don't worry. I've got this.
Couldn't be any easier. Now, let's go!

Oh, I hope this works out... I'd hate to run into any sort
of trouble.

The egg, the suspicious shadow... Multiple anomalies are
about to be tied together in the Shinjuku underground.

The reason why hostile Digimon were concentrated in the
Shinjuku underground may also lie ahead. Keep investigating.
Look! Over there!
I... know this place...
It's cracked open...
Oh, no! I can't believe this!
It... already hatched...?
It might still be nearby.
What kind of egg was it?
Maybe it got turned into an omelette and eaten?
I hope so... Let's keep looking.

It was the Egg of the Great Guardian, the one meant to save 
the world where we Digimon live, the Digital World of Iliad.
I guess this means the Great Guardian has already been born...
Th-The precious egg?! Eaten?!
Don't even joke about that!
You said you know this place. Have you visited here before?
No, not visited...
It's more like...
...I'm FROM here.
When I first opened my eyes, this is what I saw.
What?!
The Egg of the Great Guardian is cracked open...
It doesn't look it happened recently...
And we don't know where the Great Guardian who hatched from it is now...
Aegiomon says he woke up here, then made his way to us...
Wait, you don't suppose...?
Wh-what the...?
Inori...!
Oh...! Huh?! ...Ngh!
This aura... Don't tell me...!
Ngh...!
Grr... Grrrrr!
...Grrrgh!
Graaaaaaaaagh!
Ngaaaaagh!
Whoa, now!
Ngh... Unh!
Eeek!
Graaaaaaaaagh!
UWAAAAAAAAAAAGH!
Grrrgh...!
Graaaaawr!
Titamon?! I thought I lost you back there!
Hnnnf...!

Find what you were looking for, Minervamon? Well, I shall 
have to nip these potential threats to us in the bud.
Impossible! Is he prying the gate open with pure brute strength?!

Things'll get real dicey if we let that creep get out of here!
We'd better stop him in his tracks, right here and now!
Just try and stop me.
Not that you'll stand a chance!
Graaaaaaaaagh!
...Gruoh!
Hraaaaaaagh!
Hiyaaaaah!
Gragh...
Unh... Hnf... Nh... Urk!
Ngh!
Whoa! AAAAAAAAAAAGH!
Urgh... A-Aaagh!
...Ulp!
Aaagh!
Aaagh...!
Eeek!
Ngh... Agh!
Inori!
Eeeeeeek!
AAAAAAAAAAAGH!
